name: G-9 sync with operator registries: compliance-add jurisdiction EU routes to european-union/ per §17 G-9
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" --url https://gdpr.eu/x --id eu-x --jurisdiction EU --tree "$PWD/tree" --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'ns=european-union' err.txt && echo eu_routed 1>&2
